reasoning: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon structure with 149-cent spread and price 63 cents below pivot (681.61 < 682.24) confirms strong bearish alignment. Last 3 bars all green but with severely degrading bodies (84%, 22%, 15% ratios) indicate bullish momentum exhaustion rather than sustained strength. Flat overnight gap removes gap fade pressure. Ribbon verdict is primary signal — CLEAN_BEAR dominates.
